creator: pasi+freebsd@me.com
text:
(In reply to Pasi Koivisto from comment #1)

I am seeing similar messages in my logs:

Jan 28 14:27:04 X230 kernel: info: [drm] Enabling RC6 states: RC6 on, RC6p on, RC6pp on
Jan 28 14:27:04 X230 kernel: error: [drm:pid4482:intel_lvds_enable] *ERROR* timed out waiting for panel to power off
Jan 28 14:27:04 X230 kernel: error: [drm:pid1341:gen6_sanitize_pm] *ERROR* Power management discrepancy: GEN6_RP_INTERRUPT_LIMITS expected 16000000, was 12060000
Jan 28 14:27:08 X230 kernel: error: [drm:pid1341:gen6_sanitize_pm] *ERROR* Power management discrepancy: GEN6_RP_INTERRUPT_LIMITS expected 16070000, was 16000000
Jan 28 14:28:03 X230 kernel: error: [drm:pid1341:gen6_sanitize_pm] *ERROR* Power management discrepancy: GEN6_RP_INTERRUPT_LIMITS expected 00070000, was 16070000
